title: The White Lead Disease
description: Pages 6–10 focus on the white lead disease, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Corazon, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as law's childhood, the tragedy of Flevance, and his hatred for the world begin to explain why Doflamingo shaped his life.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's begin the execution, shall we?

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: We'll start with...you, law!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Behe hehe! Hey..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I still don't understand...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why does a former tenryubito like you, fallen from Mariejois...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Still hold power!? This morning...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You mobilized CPO!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Fufufu! You've got one foot in death's door and still you seek answers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I am part of the inner circles of the Holy Land, Mariejois!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: For I know of an important national treasure of theirs! One whose existence alone, if made known to the world, would shake it to its very core!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We must kill Doflamingo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We simply cannot allow that child to live!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: to them, I am...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: A Deser- Ter with an unbelievable Trump card.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: though they try to kill me, I refuse to die. The tenryuu- bite...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Have no choice but to be Coopera- Live...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What's more, if I'd had the power...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: of your ope ope no mi, that day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'd have been able to use the treasure of mariejois and hold the reins of the entire world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Such is the power you hold!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The ability to transplant even person- abilities...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: that if welded by someone with true brilliance, the ope ope no mi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: One last thing... are you aware?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: has the power to fulfill one of humanity's oldest dreams.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Those who call it the ultimate devil fruit are not few.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Yes, I am well aware. None of that interests me, however...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: The Pinnacle technique of this fruit...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Is the ability to grant eternal life.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Aseless Surgery!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: But doing so will cause...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: The user to forfeit his own life.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: FufU!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Right you are!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Truth be told, I had no intention of giving the fruit to you in the first place!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Look how you've bitten the hand that so lovingly fed you!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: Diamante's swordplay!

dialogue.speaker: Lao G
dialogue.text: LAO G'S MARTIAL ARTS!

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: Gladius's marksman- ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: We taught you every last thing you know about fighting!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: ...Yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: And what I have now is thanks to Cora!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I'm grateful.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: I'll use the power you gave me to eliminate your whole crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: You serious!? 01...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: You can't kill people with enthusiasm alone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: I've got bombs too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: You better not fuck with pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: 16 years ago, North Blue

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: What happened to the captain?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Hey Heeey.. We heard you're gonna die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: When? When are you gonna die!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Like Duffy's gonna waste his time with a newbie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Port Town Spider Miles

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Three years and two months.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Waste processing plant

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Did a doctor tell you that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: My dead parents were doctors. Look at my medical data. It's plain as day.

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Donquixote Family, @Executive@diamante & Trebol

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: UHAHA! This brat's got brains, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: In the next three years I want to kill as much as I can...destroy as much as I can!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Uhaha! This one's got a screw or...seven loose! I don't got a problem with taking in kids but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: The last 100 people to try and join up with us have gone running back to their mommies in two days or less!

summary: The White Lead Disease advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Corazon, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
